items.title: SpaceX launches satellite on behalf of UAE telecommunications company
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
A SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket launched the Thuraya 4 satellite on Friday to a geostationary transfer orbit on behalf of Yahsat, a telecommunications company and satellite service provider based in the United Arab Emirates.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

items.title: Mexico opens possibility of receiving non-Mexican deportees from Trump
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Mexico opened the possibility Friday of receiving non-Mexican migrants deported by the United States after initially saying they would push President-elect Donald Trump to return other nationalities directly to their countries of origin. Read more: https://bit.ly/41ZxbdO 

#news #mexico #trump 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

items.title: Here's what's next after Mike Johnson reelected as House speaker
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Republican Mike Johnson narrowly won reelection on a dramatic first-ballot vote for House Speaker, overcoming hard-right GOP holdouts in a tense standoff. AP explains what's next for the Republican-led 119th Congress. (AP Video: Nathan Ellgren). Read more: https://bit.ly/3W7xYWm

#news #mikejohnson 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Drone video shows deadly fireworks blast in Honolulu, Hawaii; 3 dead
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Drone video captures a New Year's Eve fireworks explosion that killed three people and wounded more than 20 in a Honolulu neighborhood. Read more: https://bit.ly/3PlD5hG 

#news #honolulu #hawaii

items.title: Man who died in Tesla Cybertruck explosion in Las Vegas says it was 'wakeup call'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
A highly decorated Army soldier who died in an explosion of a Tesla Cybertruck at the Trump hotel in Las Vegas left a note saying it was stunt to serve as “wakeup call” for the country’s ills, investigators said Friday. (AP video: Ty ONeil). Read more: https://bit.ly/4j5aZVQ 

#news #lasvegas 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: LIVE: Family of Menendez brothers hold a press conference
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Watch live as the family of Erik and Lyle Menendez hold a press conference. 

A judge delayed his decision on whether to resentence the Menendez brothers for killing their parents in their Beverly Hills mansion 35 years ago until January. 

Credit: ABC7 Los Angeles

#news #menendezbrothers

items.title: Judge sets Trump’s sentencing in hush money case, but signals no jail time
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
A judge has set President-elect Donald Trump’s sentencing in his hush money case for Jan. 10 — little over a week before he’s due to return to the White House. Read more: https://bit.ly/4gEYPRQ 

#trump #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

items.title: Mike Johnson sworn in as House Speaker after dramatic re-election vote
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Rep. Mike Johnson was officially sworn in as House Speaker once again Friday afternoon after a dramatic re-election vote. Johnson then administered the oath to all members of the 119th Congress. Read more: https://bit.ly/3W7xYWm

#news #mikejohnson 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Apple to pay $95 million to settle lawsuit accusing Siri of eavesdropping
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit accusing the company of using Siri to eavesdrop on people with iPhones and other devices. Here's what to know. #shorts

items.title: LIVE: Press conference on Tesla Cybertruck explosion in Las Vegas
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Live press conference after investigators said a highly decorated Army soldier shot himself in the head inside a Tesla Cybertruck packed with fireworks just before it exploded outside Trump International Hotel in Las Vegas on New Year’s Day. 

#news #live #lasvegas #teslacybertruck #cybertruck #tesla

items.title: LIVE: Biden delivers remarks at Medal of Honor ceremony
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Watch live as President Joe Biden delivers remarks at a Medal of Honor ceremony at the White House. 

Biden will bestow the medal posthumously to six men and one living recipient. In a separate Oval Office ceremony closed to the news media, he will award the Medal of Valor to eight first responders who put their own lives at risk to save others.

#biden #live #joebiden #medalofhonor

items.title: Mike Johnson narrowly reelected House speaker on first ballot
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: Republican Mike Johnson won reelection to the House speakership on a first ballot, pushing past GOP hard-right holdouts and buoyed with a nod of support from President-elect Donald Trump. #shorts #MikeJohnson #SpeakeroftheHouse #Housevote #Republican #Democrat

items.title: Mike Johnson reelected as House speaker in dramatic floor vote
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Republican Mike Johnson has won re-election to the House speakership on dramatic first-round voting. He pushed past GOP holdouts and got a boost from President-elect Donald Trump to succeed in keeping his position. Read more: https://bit.ly/3W7xYWm

#news #mikejohnson 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

items.title: House speaker vote LIVE: Republicans reelect Mike Johnson
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Watch live as the new Congress convenes Friday with one major task at hand — the election of the House speaker.

While Mike Johnson has the support of President-elect Donald Trump, it will be House Republicans who will decide whether to reelect him to his post as Speaker of the House.

#live #news

items.title: White House press briefing: 1/3/25
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Watch live as White House Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre briefs the media. 

#news #live #whitehousepressbriefing
